hero.title: Middle Full Stack Developer
hero.bio: Dynamic full-stack developer with over 3 years of experience delivering impactful digital solutions across private and government sectors. Expertise in Java and Vue.js, building scalable web applications and efficient management systems.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I build enterprise web applications. Currently working at Fairtech, developing government systems for the Antimonopoly Committee of Uzbekistan.
about.p2: My core technologies are Vue.js and Java Spring Boot. I work equally well on both frontend and backend.
about.p3: Outside of work, I explore new technologies and build personal projects.

fairtech.org: State Committee of the Republic of Uzbekistan for Competition Development and Consumer Rights Protection
fairtech.description: Fairtech — developing a unified system for all internal employees across the Committee's central office and 14 regional branches (Tashkent city, Tashkent region, Republic of Karakalpakstan and other regions)
fairtech.bullet1: RAIS — Competition Agency Information System: statistics module, appeal-stat API for 15 regions, monitoring dashboards
fairtech.bullet2: Compleans — compliance and unfair competition monitoring system, audits and reports
fairtech.bullet3: XT_XARID — cross-system integration platform, data synchronization
fairtech.bullet4: Migration from Vue 2 to Vue 3 — {'@'}vue/compat, 100+ components, i18n v9, Composition API
fairtech.bullet5: Dominant subjects registry CRUD, role-based permissions (ability.can())
fairtech.bullet6: PDF generation system (html2pdf.js) — government document formats
fairtech.bullet7: quiz.fairtech.uz — online quiz system for government inspectors nationwide
fairtech.bullet8: cabinet.fairtech.uz — modular cabinet system for internal use

texno.description: Web application development with Java and Spring
texno.bullet1: Developed web applications using Java and Spring framework
texno.bullet2: Created and maintained CRM systems to improve customer management
texno.bullet3: Engineered automatic operation system for magazine publishing
texno.bullet4: Designed user-friendly interfaces for websites and Telegram bots
texno.bullet5: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver quality solutions

rais.desc: Competition Agency Information System — statistics module, appeal-stat API (15 regions), monitoring dashboards, report generation

compleans.desc: Compliance and unfair competition monitoring system — audits, reports, entity management

xtxarid.desc: Tender investigation and procurement monitoring system — lot-based inspections, disciplinary actions, status workflow, file uploads, integration (REST/NDJSON), distinguishing manual and automatic checks

fairtech_portal.desc: Company internal portal — fully responsive design, user management

dominant.desc: Dominant subjects registry CRUD — role-based permissions, dynamic multi-input, entity relations

tasir_chora.desc: Disciplinary actions module — administrative protocol, case initiation, violation detection. Support for multiple violators and victims, file uploads, status-based filtering

uz_map.desc: Interactive Uzbekistan map — dynamic region color change on hover and active state, color intensity based on number of appeals, SVG-based

birthday_bot.desc: Telegram birthday greeting bot — group management, multi-group user support, automatic age calculation, admin commands

trading_bot.desc: TradingView signal bot — 1m/5m/15m candlestick analysis, GPT-powered market assessment, buy/sell recommendations via Telegram

gpt_bot.desc: GPT-integrated Telegram bot — answers questions via OpenAI API, deployed on Heroku, Python-based

dnd_builder.desc: Nested drag & drop builder — placing elements inside elements, undo/redo functionality, Pinia state management, completed as a test task

royce.desc: Royce Logistics — QuickManage platform clone. Freight management, order tracking, monitoring and reporting system for a logistics company. Modern frontend with Nuxt 3 + Tailwind CSS

adizone.desc: Adizone CRM — customer relationship management system. Orders, client database, statistics and reports. SPA architecture with Vue 3 + Pinia

media_bot.desc: Multi-platform media download bot — download videos/audio from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok via Telegram. Send a link — bot returns the file

pharm.desc: Pharmacy monitoring module — pharmaceutical inspection system. Tab-based workflow (in progress, pending approval, completed), result submission, approve/reject, file uploads, optimized API for faster performance

teda_crm.desc: Texno Dargoh CRM system — client database, order management, operations automation

teda_web.desc: teda.uz corporate website and Telegram bot — company services, events, communication

ibrat.desc: Ibrat Club — event organization platform, registration, Telegram bot integration

quiz.desc: quiz.fairtech.uz — online testing system for government inspectors nationwide

cabinet.desc: cabinet.fairtech.uz — modular cabinet system for internal use, task management

fairtech_main.desc: fairtech.uz — core workflow automation platform for internal use

portfolio.desc: Personal portfolio website — 5 design versions, 3 languages, dark/light theme
